attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/21XWA/2017-07-16/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/21XWA/2017-07-31/Seq00/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (-0.0980, 0.0134) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/15.0 = 0.7.
attrs.history:
2018-05-11 15:33:54 | Combined 2 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/21XWA/2017-07-15_to_2017-07-29/2017-07-16_Seq00_to_2017-07-31_Seq00.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/21XWA/2017-07-15_to_2017-07-29/2017-07-18_Seq00_to_2017-07-28_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.

2018-05-11 16:14:02 | Stacked in time from 2 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/21XWA/2017-07-15_to_2017-07-29.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/21XWA/2017-07-30_to_2017-08-14.nc'].

2018-05-14 20:50:18 | Tiles merged from 2 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/season/2017_Stacked_21XWA.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/season/2017_Stacked_21XWB.nc'].
